label: Simple English
welcomeSubtitle: EINWURF – Future of Democracy 01.2021 · Bertelsmann Foundation
welcomeDesc: This questionnaire asks about right-wing extremist attitudes. There are 18 statements in 6 areas. For each statement, tell us: Do you agree? Or do you disagree?
welcomeDisclaimer: Important: This test is not a professional diagnosis. The evaluation uses the right-wing extremism scale by the Bertelsmann Foundation.
helpDesc: If you have questions about your results or are worried: Here you will find trusted places that can help you.
helpMapHint: The map shows counseling centers against right-wing extremism. Allow location access to find help near you.

helpEntries.title: Federal Agency for Civic Education (bpb)
helpEntries.desc: Information about right-wing extremism and democracy.

helpEntries.title: Victim Counseling – RIAS Network
helpEntries.desc: Help for people affected by right-wing violence.

helpEntries.title: Mobile Counseling Against Right-Wing Extremism
helpEntries.desc: Counseling for people who want to engage against right-wing extremism.

helpEntries.title: Exit Programs for Right-Wing Extremism
helpEntries.desc: Help for people who want to leave the right-wing extremist scene.

helpEntries.title: Nummer gegen Kummer (Helpline)
helpEntries.desc: Free counseling for youth and parents – also about extremism.

questions: Sometimes a dictatorship is better for the country.
Germany only needs one single strong party.
We need a strong leader for Germany.
We should be proud of Germany again.
Germany must assert itself strongly against other countries.
Without the Holocaust, Hitler would be a great statesman.
The crimes of the Nazis are exaggerated.
National Socialism also had good sides.
Foreigners only come to Germany to get money from the state.
When there are not enough jobs, foreigners should leave.
Jews still have too much influence today.
Jews use nasty tricks to get what they want.
Jews are different and don't fit in with us.
In society, the stronger should prevail.
Germans are naturally superior to other peoples.
There is valuable and worthless life.
